title: 2 Pack Large Self Adhesive Hooks, Stainless Steel Sticky Hook Heavy Duty, Over 12kg Load - Strong Hooks for Hanging for Towel, Coat, Robe, Stick on Bathroom, Kitchen, Door and Wall
features: Large Hooks for Hanging Heavy Duty: These strong self adhesive hooks measure 3.5 x 2.0 x 2.0in and boast a weight capacity exceeding 26lb. This wall hook fulfils all your household hanging needs, designed to bring joy to every well-organised space in your home.

Classic Bathroom Accessories: These shower hooks retains the classic hook shape for quick hanging and removal. Its extra-large adhesive surface securely holds every towel, bathrobe, and more firmly in place, even in the bathroom, with no worries about it falling off.

Hooks for Walls No Damage: These heavy duty adhesive hooks feature branded waterproof adhesive pads for effortless attachment to any smooth surface. Their powerful adhesion and generous opening accommodate thick, heavy items with equal reliability and durability.

Trusted Quality: Hooks for hanging heavy duty crafted from premium stainless steel, every edge undergoes precise deburring for a smooth, seamless finish free from sharp points. These heavy duty hooks will not scratch or damage your belongings, and carry no risk of detachment, ensuring high safety standards.

Versatile Usage: An essential household item, these towel hooks serve as towel racks for bathrooms, door hooks, or wall hooks. They also function as bathroom decor, kitchen decor, wall decor, ideal for hanging plants or festive decorations.
